summary: Frontend-only verification after iteration_9 UI fixes. All three targeted fixes verified working: (1) Android install banner shows with manual instructions via 'Come fare' path, (2) Admin dashboard has no push/notifications section, (3) DB shows real data only (1 admin user, all other counts 0). iOS regression and abbonamento/premium regressions also pass.

android_install_banner.help_text_mentions: tre puntini, Installa app, Aggiungi a schermata Home

critical_code_review_comments: InstallBanner correctly distinguishes iOS vs Android via UA and shows appropriate manual instructions. Falls back gracefully in headless (no beforeinstallprompt).
Admin.jsx cleanly removed BellRinging StatCard and Push column — no dead imports (BellRinging still imported? check: not imported, confirmed clean).
Note: /abbonamento page snippet includes fallback text 'You need to enable JavaScript to run this app.' — this is just from noscript tag in index.html, no real issue.
seed_data_creation: None — verified real seeded admin only
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 UI fixes verified. InstallBanner shows on iOS + Android UAs with 'Come fare' -> manual instructions (data-testid=ios-install-help / android-install-help). Dismiss persists via localStorage key pawcare_install_dismissed=1. Admin dashboard clean (no Notifiche stat, no Push column). DB shows 1 admin user, all zeros. Login/premium/abbonamento regressions pass.
